buildConfig.build_command: curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash && export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun" && export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH" && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun --filter @roxabi-live/app build

notes: Staging Pages project (production_branch=staging). Proxy Worker: roxabi-live-app-staging (wrangler.worker-staging.jsonc).
